title: FundedYouth.org
description: Official website of FundedYouth. Learn about classes, workshops, competitions, donations, and more.

title: The Vault
description: Members only in-store file server. Access limited edition 3D Prints and Laser Cut Designs.

title: Portal
description: FundedYouth member portal for accounts, enrollment, and program access.

title: Q-Up
description: Queue and check-in tool for managing onsite participants and sessions.

title: MakerWorld
description: Discover, download, and share ready-to-print 3D models for your projects.

title: Thingiverse
description: The largest 3D printing community to find and share printable designs.

title: Tinkercad
description: Free, easy-to-use app for 3D design, electronics, and coding.

title: Code.org
description: Learn computer science with courses, tutorials, and hands-on coding activities.

title: MakeCode
description: Microsoft MakeCode block & text editor for physical computing and games.

title: n8n
description: Workflow automation tool to connect apps and build automated pipelines.
